meta.backtest_command: cd prosperity_rust_backtester && ./scripts/cargo_local.sh run --release -- --trader traders/latest_trader.py --dataset round5 --products full --artifact-mode full --flat --run-id <run_id>
notes: Research artifact only; not a final trader.
Lead-lag OOS edge is a sign-prediction proxy on lagged one-tick returns.
Basket and pair edges are residual-reversion proxies with leave-one-day-out validation.
